content: We can adapt the 2025 ICM intrinsic curiosity mechanism from autonomous agents to proactively optimize LoCoMo motion planning latency: a curiosity-driven reward is given for exploring under-characterized, low-latency motion trajectories that are rarely encountered in standard training datasets, rather than only optimizing for pre-specified path cost objectives. This approach is particularly suited for latency-critical swarm UAV motion planning, which already leverages ICM for swarm coordination, creating a unified framework that simultaneously improves exploration and reduces end-to-end motion planning delay.
